image:image.image:caption: Tomato Mien rules list screen with search bar, active/total count, sort options, and rule cards with toggle

image:image.image:title: Tomato Mien Rule Editor
image:image.image:caption: Tomato Mien rule editor with filters (AND), triggers (OR), summary, notification toggle, and scheduled activation

image:image.image:caption: Tomato Mien Pomodoro screen with a circular timer, session progress dots, and a start button

image:image.image:title: Tomato Mien Settings
image:image.image:caption: Tomato Mien settings screen with time format, theme, preview section, and Pomodoro plugin toggle
